name_cn:
In-stock Black!!️
Lady latest model double shoulder strap, beaded pendants, new strap looks so good🤩 Allows Lady to be worn underarm! A unique romantic style, too attractive to girls, helps you capture moments of love. Classic bag shape, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, unlocking multiple carrying styles. Can't help falling in love.
size:17cm
